title: Prompt Catalog
description: Machine-readable catalog of all prompt files in the repository. Auto-generated by bin/generate-prompt-catalog.py and validated in CI. Provides a searchable index with content hashes for drift detection.

version.description: Schema version for the prompt catalog format.

prompt_count.description: Total number of prompts in the catalog.

prompts.description: Array of prompt entries discovered during catalog generation.

id.description: Unique identifier derived from the file path (e.g., 'global/summarize').

name.description: Human-readable prompt name from frontmatter or derived from filename.

description.description: Brief description of the prompt's purpose from frontmatter.

tags.description: Categorical tags for filtering and search.

model.description: Recommended or required model for this prompt. Null if model-agnostic.

file_path.description: Relative path to the prompt file from the repository root.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the full file contents for drift detection.

last_modified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification (from git log or filesystem).
